task_updates.executor_notes: Ran the required full-module validations successfully: `npx vitest run src/shared/contexts/GallerySelectionContext.test.tsx` passed (1 file, 8 tests), `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` passed (17 files, 52 tests), and `npx vitest run src/features/gallery/` passed (9 files, 36 tests). Added a temporary Vitest harness at `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/__tmp_unifiedSelectionVerification.test.tsx`, ran it with `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/hooks/__tmp_unifiedSelectionVerification.test.tsx`, and confirmed both directions of the unified selection behavior: plain gallery selection clears timeline while gallery toggle preserves it, and plain timeline selection clears gallery while timeline toggle preserves it. The temporary file was then deleted, so there are no persistent file changes from T4. No broader suite beyond the required modules was run.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. All required existing test scopes passed without regressions: `src/shared/contexts/GallerySelectionContext.test.tsx` (8/8), `src/tools/video-editor/` (52/52 across 17 files), and `src/features/gallery/` (36/36 across 9 files). The additional temporary harness for the exact unified-selection behavior also passed and was removed afterward.
